title: Restore all 18 missing comic panels and ensure complete story display

requirements.text: Add the 18 missing comic panel images to the frontend assets so all panels from the complete story are rendered without gaps
acceptanceCriteria: All 18 previously missing panel images are present in frontend/public/assets/generated
Panel numbering is complete with no gaps in the sequence
All panels load successfully in the ComicViewer component

requirements.text: Verify that all chapters from comicData.ts are rendered in the ComicViewer without any chapters being skipped or filtered out

quotes: no chapter is removed from this because The full story is here

acceptanceCriteria: Every chapter defined in comicData.ts appears in the rendered output
Chapter filtering or exclusion logic (if any exists) is removed
The complete narrative sequence is preserved from start to finish

requirements.text: Ensure the progressive rendering system in useProgressivePanels displays all panels from the complete story without truncation

quotes: all of the panels are shown and MAKE SURE OF THAT

acceptanceCriteria: The load-more functionality reveals all remaining panels
No artificial caps prevent displaying the complete panel count
Users can view the entire story from beginning to end

constraints: Must preserve existing comic data structure in comicData.ts
Must maintain the chapter organization without removing any chapters
Must not alter the progressive rendering performance optimization pattern
nonGoals: Changing the visual style or layout of existing panels
Modifying the translation or localization system
Altering the narration or speech recognition features
